deletePolicyDialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete the policy "{{name}}"?
deletePolicyDialog.description: This will delete the policy "{{name}}" and all associated time off requests.

deleteHolidayDialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete the company holiday pay policy?
deleteHolidayDialog.description: This will delete the company holiday pay policy.

emptyState.heading: You don't have any time off policies
emptyState.body: Manage employee time off by creating a policy.

selectPolicyType.title: Select policy type
selectPolicyType.policyTypeHint: Select the type of time off policy you want to set up for your team.
selectPolicyType.holidayHint: Give employees time off for company holidays. Choose which holidays to observe.
selectPolicyType.timeOffHint: Use for paid leave or combine vacation and sick time into one PTO policy.
selectPolicyType.sickLeaveHint: Paid time employees can use when they're sick or caring for their health.

flash.invalidPolicyType: Please select a valid policy type.
